calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Barbara Fields-Siotis.

The Court stated that language of the Trust is very broad in general. Mr. Kato stated that administration of the Trust will be sited in California and will be subject to California Trust laws. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Barbara Fields-Siotis.

Mr. Kato presented oral argument to support his position. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Continued To Oct-01-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (4353 17th Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Barbara Fields-Siotis.

The sale was confirmed to Eileen Mougeot on behalf of Brandon Duncan at $560,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed March 28,2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Proceeds are to be deposited into a blocked account in lieu of bond. Status on filing of receipt for the blocked account was set for May 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
